category_sources: source_facts.description says DHCP server; official ISC Kea page describes Kea as DHCP software and references Kea daemons.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name; official ISC page title is Kea DHCP.
docs_sources: official ISC Kea page states the Kea Administrator Reference Manual is the primary reference for configuration and links to kea.readthedocs.io.
repo_sources: official ISC Kea page says Kea is developed in the open on ISC GitLab and links to the project repo.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executable names include kea-dhcp4 and kea-dhcp6; official ISC page describes DHCPv4/DHCPv6 server configuration.
